name: 电场与电力
subject: physics
domain_name: 电与磁 / Electricity & Magnetism / Electricity & Magnetism
curriculum_points: HS-PS2-4. Use mathematical representations of Newton’s Law of Gravitation and Coulomb’s Law to describe and predict the gravitational and electrostatic forces between objects.

HS-PS3-5. Develop and use a model of two objects interacting through electric or magnetic fields to illustrate the forces between objects and the changes in energy of the objects due to the interaction.

interactive_resources.description: PhET 力与运动基础：推拉小车观察加速度（中文版）
GeoGebra 牛顿第二定律 F=ma 参数调节
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「电场与电力」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS2-4. Use mathematical representations of Newton’s Law of Gravitation and Coulomb’s Law to describe and predict the …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-PS3-5. Develop and use a model of two objects interacting through electric or… 对理解「电场与电力」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
